short_desc: Transformed my understanding of healthy eating
review_text: I'd tried every fad diet going before I found this site. The nutrition guides are evidence-based and practical — no gimmicks. The BMI and calorie calculators helped me set realistic goals I've actually stuck to.
As a patient trying to understand my health conditions, I found the guides on this site far more useful than generic NHS pages. Clear, accurate and written in a way anyone can understand.

short_desc: The beginner workout guides gave me confidence
review_text: I'd been too intimidated to start exercising. The beginner's guides built up my confidence step by step. Six months later I'm running 5km three times a week — something I never thought possible.
When I was diagnosed with type 2 diabetes I was overwhelmed. The guide on this site helped me understand my condition and make the diet and lifestyle changes my doctor recommended.

short_desc: Helped me understand and manage my anxiety
review_text: The anxiety guide was the first time I felt like my experience was described accurately. It pointed me towards the right NHS support and gave me practical self-help strategies.

short_desc: Best free resource for evidence-based fitness
review_text: I'm a personal trainer and I recommend this site to my clients. The fitness and nutrition information is up-to-date, accurate and presented in a way that motivates people to make lasting changes.
